title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to Java - Java programming Environment and Runtime
Environment, Development Platforms -Standard, Enterprise. Java Virtual
Machine (JVM), Java compiler, Bytecode, Java Buzzwords, Java program
structure. Java Fundamentals: Primitive Data types - Integers, Floating Point
Types, Characters, Boolean. Literals, Type Conversion and Casting,
Variables, Arrays, Strings, Operators - Control Statements -Selection
Statements, Iteration Statements and Jump Statements.

title: Module 2
content:
Object Oriented Programming in Java – Class Fundamentals, Declaring
Objects, Introduction to Methods, Constructors, this Keyword. Method
Overloading, Access Control, Final Variables, Inner Classes. Inheritance -
Super Class, Sub Class, The Keyword super, protected Members, Calling
Order of Constructors, Method Overriding, Abstract Classes and Methods,
using final with Inheritance.

title: Module 3
content:
Packages and Interfaces – Defining Package, Importing Packages,
Interfaces. Exception Handling – Checked Exceptions, Unchecked
Exceptions, try Block and catch Clause, Multiple catch Clauses,throw,
throws and finally. Input/Output - I/O Basics ,Reading Console Input,
Writing Console Output, Working with Files. String Handling – String
Constructors, String Length, Special String Operations .

title: Module 4
content:
Advanced features of Java-Event handling - Event Handling Mechanisms,
Delegation Event Model, Event Classes, Sources of Events, Event Listener
Interfaces, Using the Delegation Model.Multithreaded Programming - The
Java Thread Model ,The Main Thread, Creating Thread, Creating Multiple
Threads, Synchronization, Suspending, Resuming and Stopping Threads.
